source_pr.title: infoschema, executor: Add the deadlock table
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary: As part of [Lock View](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/24199) , there will be a new system table named `DEAD_LOCK` that shows information about recent several deadlock error.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: 

* A module named `deadlockhistory` is introduced, located in the `util` directory like `stmtsummary`. It contains a global instance of a queue to collect deadlock events in FIFO manner.
* An `OnDeadlock` callback is added to `LockCtx`, and is called at the time the deadlock error is received from TiKV but before pessimsticRollback.
* A new table `DEAD_LOCK` in information schema is added to show the collected deadlock events in the TiDB node,  and also a cluster version `CLUSTER_DEAD_LOCK` that shows deadlock information from all TiDB nodes in the cluster.
  * Each row of the `DEAD_LOCK` table represents one of the transactions that causes the deadlock, and rows with the same `DEADLOCK_ID` forms a complete deadlock event. 
  * For `CLUSTER_DEAD_LOCK` table, rows with the same `(INSTANCE, DEADLOCK_ID)` forms a deadlock event since the `DEADLOCK_ID` is not unique among different TiDB nodes.

Note that the `ALL_SQLS` field in our design is not ye implemented in this PR. It relies on the `TIDB_TRX` table, and also the current PR is already too large.

Example:

```sql
/* init */ drop table if exists t;
-- init >> 0 rows affected
/* init */ create table t (id int primary key, v int);
-- init >> 0 rows affected
/* init */ insert into t values (1, 10), (2, 20), (3, 30);
-- init >> 3 rows affected
/* t1:wait */ begin;
-- t1 >> 0 rows affected
/* t1 */ update t set v = 11 where id = 1;
-- t1 >> 1 rows affected
/* t2 */ begin;
-- t2 >> 0 rows affected
/* t2 */ update t set v = 21 where id = 2;
-- t2 >> 1 rows affected
/* t1:wait */ update t set v = 12 where id = 2;
-- t1 >> blocked
/* t2 */ update t set v = 22 where id = 1;
-- t2 >> E1213: Deadlock found when trying to get lock; try restarting transaction
-- t1 >> resumed
-- t1 >> 1 rows affected
/* t1 */ rollback;
-- t1 >> 0 rows affected
/* t2 */ rollback;
-- t2 >> 0 rows affected
/* t3:wait */ select * from information_schema.deadlocks;
-- t3 >> +-------------+----------------------------+-----------+--------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+----------+--------------------+
-- t3    | DEADLOCK ID |         OCCUR TIME         | RETRYABLE |  TRY LOCK TRX ID   |                        CURRENT SQL DIGEST                        |                  KEY                   | ALL SQLS |  TRX HOLDING LOCK  |
-- t3    +-------------+----------------------------+-----------+--------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+----------+--------------------+
-- t3    |           1 | 2021-05-19 10:48:09.567305 |         0 | 425045860169023490 | 22230766411edb40f27a68dadefc63c6c6970d5827f1e5e22fc97be2c4d8350d | 7480000000000000355F728000000000000002 | NULL     | 425045860169023491 |
-- t3    |           1 | 2021-05-19 10:48:09.567305 |         0 | 425045860169023491 | 22230766411edb40f27a68dadefc63c6c6970d5827f1e5e22fc97be2c4d8350d | 7480000000000000355F728000000000000001 | NULL     | 425045860169023490 |
-- t3    +-------------+----------------------------+-----------+--------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+----------+--------------------+
/* t3:wait */ select l.deadlock_id, l.occur_time, l.try_lock_trx_id, l.trx_holding_lock, s.digest_text from information_schema.deadlocks as l left join information_schema.statements_summary as s on l.current_sql_digest = s.digest;
-- t3 >> +-------------+----------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-----------------------------------------+
-- t3    | DEADLOCK ID |         OCCUR TIME         |  TRY LOCK TRX ID   |  TRX HOLDING LOCK  |               DIGEST TEXT               |
-- t3    +-------------+----------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-----------------------------------------+
-- t3    |           1 | 2021-05-19 10:48:09.567305 | 425045860169023490 | 425045860169023491 | update `t` set `v` = ? where `id` = ? ; |
-- t3    |           1 | 2021-05-19 10:48:09.567305 | 425045860169023491 | 425045860169023490 | update `t` set `v` = ? where `id` = ? ; |
-- t3    +-------------+----------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-----------------------------------------+
/* t1:wait */ begin;
-- t1 >> 0 rows affected
/* t1 */ update t set v = 11 where id = 1;
-- t1 >> 1 rows affected
/* t2 */ begin;
-- t2 >> 0 rows affected
/* t2 */ update t set v = 21 where id = 2;
-- t2 >> 1 rows affected
/* t3 */ begin;
-- t3 >> 0 rows affected
/* t3 */ update t set v = 31 where id = 3;
-- t3 >> 1 rows affected
/* t1:wait */ update t set v = 12 where id = 2;
-- t1 >> blocked
/* t2 */ update t set v = 22 where id = 3;
-- t2 >> blocked
/* t3 */ update t set v = 32 where id = 1;
-- t3 >> E1213: Deadlock found when trying to get lock; try restarting transaction
-- t2 >> resumed
-- t2 >> 1 rows affected
/* t2 */ rollback;
-- t2 >> 0 rows affected
-- t1 >> resumed
-- t1 >> 1 rows affected
/* t1 */ rollback;
-- t1 >> 0 rows affected
/* t3 */ rollback;
-- t3 >> 0 rows affected
/* t4:wait */ select * from information_schema.deadlocks;
-- t4 >> +-------------+----------------------------+-----------+--------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+----------+--------------------+
-- t4    | DEADLOCK ID |         OCCUR TIME         | RETRYABLE |  TRY LOCK TRX ID   |                        CURRENT SQL DIGEST                        |                  KEY                   | ALL SQLS |  TRX HOLDING LOCK  |
-- t4    +-------------+----------------------------+-----------+--------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+----------+--------------------+
-- t4    |           1 | 2021-05-19 10:48:09.567305 |         0 | 425045860169023490 | 22230766411edb40f27a68dadefc63c6c6970d5827f1e5e22fc97be2c4d8350d | 7480000000000000355F728000000000000002 | NULL     | 425045860169023491 |
-- t4    |           1 | 2021-05-19 10:48:09.567305 |         0 | 425045860169023491 | 22230766411edb40f27a68dadefc63c6c6970d5827f1e5e22fc97be2c4d8350d | 7480000000000000355F728000000000000001 | NULL     | 425045860169023490 |
-- t4    |           2 | 2021-05-19 10:48:27.592010 |         0 | 425045862528319493 | 22230766411edb40f27a68dadefc63c6c6970d5827f1e5e22fc97be2c4d8350d | 7480000000000000355F728000000000000002 | NULL     | 425045862528319494 |
-- t4    |           2 | 2021-05-19 10:48:27.592010 |         0 | 425045862528319494 | 22230766411edb40f27a68dadefc63c6c6970d5827f1e5e22fc97be2c4d8350d | 7480000000000000355F728000000000000003 | NULL     | 425045862528319495 |
-- t4    |           2 | 2021-05-19 10:48:27.592010 |         0 | 425045862528319495 | 22230766411edb40f27a68dadefc63c6c6970d5827f1e5e22fc97be2c4d8350d | 7480000000000000355F728000000000000001 | NULL     | 425045862528319493 |
-- t4    +-------------+----------------------------+-----------+--------------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------+----------+--------------------+
/* t4:wait */ select l.deadlock_id, l.occur_time, l.try_lock_trx_id, l.trx_holding_lock, s.digest_text from information_schema.deadlocks as l left join information_schema.statements_summary as s on l.current_sql_digest = s.digest;
-- t4 >> +-------------+----------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-----------------------------------------+
-- t4    | DEADLOCK ID |         OCCUR TIME         |  TRY LOCK TRX ID   |  TRX HOLDING LOCK  |               DIGEST TEXT               |
-- t4    +-------------+----------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-----------------------------------------+
-- t4    |           1 | 2021-05-19 10:48:09.567305 | 425045860169023490 | 425045860169023491 | update `t` set `v` = ? where `id` = ? ; |
-- t4    |           1 | 2021-05-19 10:48:09.567305 | 425045860169023491 | 425045860169023490 | update `t` set `v` = ? where `id` = ? ; |
-- t4    |           2 | 2021-05-19 10:48:27.592010 | 425045862528319493 | 425045862528319494 | update `t` set `v` = ? where `id` = ? ; |
-- t4    |           2 | 2021-05-19 10:48:27.592010 | 425045862528319494 | 425045862528319495 | update `t` set `v` = ? where `id` = ? ; |
-- t4    |           2 | 2021-05-19 10:48:27.592010 | 425045862528319495 | 425045862528319493 | update `t` set `v` = ? where `id` = ? ; |
-- t4    +-------------+----------------------------+--------------------+--------------------+-----------------------------------------+

```

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:
  - TODO
- Requires https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/24380 to be merged first

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test (TODO)
- Integration test (TODO)

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- Adds table `DEAD_LOCK` and `CLUSTER_DEAD_LOCK` table that provides information about recent several deadlock events
